Name: FMeshReductionSettings
Description: Settings used to reduce a mesh.

Variables.Name: BaseLODModel
Variables.Description: Source Index. The index into source models from which to generate the LOD from

Variables.Name: MetricToUse
Variables.Description: Optimize the mesh based on the following metric option

Variables.Name: PercentTriangles
Variables.Description: Percentage of triangles to keep. 1.0 = no reduction, 0.0 = no triangles.

Variables.Name: MaxDeviation
Variables.Description: The maximum distance in object space by which the reduced mesh may deviate from the original mesh.

Variables.Name: PixelError
Variables.Description: The amount of error in pixels allowed for this LOD.

Variables.Name: WeldingThreshold
Variables.Description: Threshold in object space at which vertices are welded together.

Variables.Name: SilhouetteImportance
Variables.Description: Higher values minimize change to border edges.

Variables.Name: ShadingImportance
Variables.Description: Higher values try to preserve normals better.

Variables.Name: VertexColorImportance
Variables.Description: Higher values minimize change to vertex color data.

Variables.Name: HardAngleThreshold
Variables.Description: Angle at which a hard edge is introduced between faces.

Variables.Name: bUseVertexWeights
Variables.Description:
Vertex colors are converted to weights. The weights are used
	- Red: Vertices will be less important

Variables.Name: bSimplifyMaterials
Variables.Description: The following will create a material proxy
